types.label: Alleycat
types.summary: Feed by force or intimidation — stalk, overpower, and drink when you can.

types.label: Bagger
types.summary: Procure cold or preserved blood through theft, black markets, or medical channels instead of hunting the living.
benefits: Specialty: Larceny (Lock Picking) or Streetwise (Black Market)
+1 Blood Sorcery (Tremere/Banu Haqim), Oblivion (Hecata/Lasombra), or Obfuscate

types.label: Blood Leech
types.summary: Feed on vampire vitae rather than mortals — hunted, coerced, or paid for.

types.label: Cleaver
types.summary: Covertly feed from mortal family or close friends you still maintain ties with.

types.label: Consensualist
types.summary: Never feed against a vessel's free will — charity drives, kink communities, or open consent.

types.label: Extortionist
types.summary: Force victims to bleed for you, or trade blood for protection, surveillance, and favors.

types.label: Farmer
benefits: Specialty: Animal Ken (Specific Animal) or Survival (Hunting)
restrictions: Ventrue cannot select; Blood Potency 3+ cannot select

types.label: Graverobber
types.summary: Feed from fresh corpses, mourners, and the frightened — often tied to hospitals, morgues, or churches.

types.label: Grim Reaper
types.summary: Hunt hospice, assisted living, and others near death — always moving to find the next dying vessel.

types.label: Montero
types.summary: Retainers or allies drive prey toward you — long cons, flash mobs, or coordinated pursuits.

types.label: Osiris
types.summary: Feed from cultists, congregations, fans, or any devoted group you sway.
benefits: Specialty: Occult (Specific Tradition) or Performance (Specific Entertainment Field)
drawbacks: 2 dots between Enemies and Mythic Flaws

types.label: Pursuer
types.summary: Stalk a victim, learn their habits, and strike when hunger and opportunity align.

types.label: Sandman
types.summary: Feed from sleeping mortals — breaking into homes, hospitals, or targeting the homeless.

types.label: Scene Queen
types.summary: Hunt within a subculture or exclusive scene where you hold status and a crafted pose.
benefits: Specialty: Etiquette, Leadership, or Streetwise (Specific Scene)
drawbacks: Influence Flaw: Disliked • (outside subculture) or Feeding Flaw: Prey Exclusion • (other subculture)

types.label: Siren
types.summary: Feed through seduction or under the pretense of sexual encounters.

types.label: Trapdoor
types.summary: Build a nest — club, haunt, or trap — and lure prey inside on your terms.
benefits: Specialty: Persuasion (Marketing) or Stealth (Ambushes or Traps)
+1 Retainers, Herd, or second Haven dot
